# ExtraCover Limited announced that it has received £21 million in funding from Sompo Holdings, Inc. and other investors - marketscreener.com

## 摘要

ExtraCover Limited announced that it has received £21 million in funding from Sompo Holdings, Inc. and other investors&nbsp;&nbsp;marketscreener.com
